channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: 11/6: Rettungseinsatz
item.description: Unregelmäßige Intervalle in beiden Richtungen. Linie 11: Unregelmäßige Intervalle in beiden Richtungen. [Am 11.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Unregelmäßige Intervalle in beiden Richtungen. Linie 11: Unregelmäßige Intervalle in beiden Richtungen.
[Am 11.06.2026]

item.title: 10A: Verkehrsunfall
item.description: Unregelmäßige Intervalle in beiden Richtungen. Grund: Verkehrsunfall im Haltestellenbereich Türkenschanzplatz. [Am 11.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Unregelmäßige Intervalle in beiden Richtungen. Grund: Verkehrsunfall im Haltestellenbereich Türkenschanzplatz.
[Am 11.06.2026]

item.title: 19A: roadworks Alaudagasse
item.description: Because of construction works in the Alaudagasse range, the 19A line is redirected. [11.06.2026 – 17.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of construction works in the Alaudagasse range, the 19A line is redirected.
[11.06.2026 – 17.07.2026]

item.title: 67A/67B: construction works Alaudagasse
item.description: Because of construction works in the Alaudagasse lines 67A and 67B are redirected. [11.06.2026 – 17.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of construction works in the Alaudagasse lines 67A and 67B are redirected.
[11.06.2026 – 17.07.2026]

item.title: S1/S2/S3/S4/S7: S-Bahn-Stammstrecke (phase 1), 2)
item.description: S-Bahn-Stammstrecke (phase 1) Because of construction works, the Vienna Stammstrecke as well as the northern branches are blocked. [10.06.2026 – 08.09.2026]
item.content:encoded:
S-Bahn-Stammstrecke (phase 1) Because of construction works, the Vienna Stammstrecke as well as the northern branches are blocked.
[10.06.2026 – 08.09.2026]

item.title: 5B: diversionVolkertplatz
item.description: Because of construction works in the Volkertplatz range, the 5B line is redirected. [11.06.2026 – 17.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of construction works in the Volkertplatz range, the 5B line is redirected.
[11.06.2026 – 17.06.2026]

item.title: S80: construction works
item.description: S80 Due to construction works partial failures of S80. Period: Phase 1X: From Saturday, 4. July 2026 to Sunday, 6. September 2026. Phase 2: From Monday, 7. September 2026 to … [From 04.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
S80 Due to construction works partial failures of S80. Period: Phase 1X: From Saturday, 4. July 2026 to Sunday, 6. September 2026. Phase 2: From Monday, 7. September 2026 to …
[From 04.07.2026]

item.title: N20: Erzherzog-Karl-Straße
item.description: Channel breaking Due to urgent renovation work in the station area, the line N20 is run in both directions via the main carriageway and can be the station … [10.06.2026 – 17.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Channel breaking Due to urgent renovation work in the station area, the line N20 is run in both directions via the main carriageway and can be the station …
[10.06.2026 – 17.06.2026]

item.title: 53A: diversion
item.description: Because of roadworks in the Ratmannsdorfgasse, the diversion line has an diversion. [15.06.2026 – 19.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of roadworks in the Ratmannsdorfgasse, the diversion line has an diversion.
[15.06.2026 – 19.06.2026]
